name: AI Research - Method/Model
description: For algorithmic, architectural, and model innovation projects

survey.label: Literature Scope
survey.placeholder: Search boundary, keywords, and covered subtopics

survey.label: Key References
survey.placeholder: One reference or paper family per line

survey.label: Synthesis Summary
survey.placeholder: Main trends, dominant baselines, unresolved tensions

promotion.label: Slide Outline
promotion.placeholder: One slide or scene per line

promotion.label: Deck Style
promotion.placeholder: Visual style, color, layout, and pacing guidance

promotion.label: Homepage Plan
promotion.placeholder: Sections, assets, links, and CTA for the project page

promotion.label: TTS Config
promotion.placeholder: Voice, engine, pacing, and narration constraints

promotion.label: Video Assembly Plan
promotion.placeholder: How slides, audio, captions, and demo clips should be assembled

quality_gate: Method families and strongest baselines are mapped
Open gaps connect directly to the proposed method direction

task_blueprints.title: Map literature landscape and dominant baseline families
task_blueprints.description: Survey recent methods, identify dominant design patterns, and cluster representative baselines.

task_blueprints.title: Synthesize unresolved gaps for method innovation
task_blueprints.description: Summarize what current methods miss and where a new method can create measurable value.

quality_gate: Novel method contribution over baselines is explicit
Claim boundaries and target setting are concrete

task_blueprints.title: Define novelty claim and theoretical motivation
task_blueprints.description: Clarify what is new, why it should work, and expected tradeoffs.

task_blueprints.title: Map design space and baseline comparison plan
task_blueprints.description: Identify main design alternatives and strong baseline families.

quality_gate: Ablation matrix and training protocol are executable
Evaluation includes robustness and significance checks

task_blueprints.title: Implement method and reproducible training setup
task_blueprints.description: Prepare code path, hyperparameter defaults, seeds, and run manifests.

task_blueprints.title: Run ablations, robustness checks, and statistical validation
task_blueprints.description: Execute core benchmarks, ablations, and reliability analysis.

quality_gate: Claims are aligned with empirical evidence
Figures/tables communicate ablations and comparisons clearly

task_blueprints.title: Draft results narrative and key comparison figures
task_blueprints.description: Turn experiment outcomes into coherent claim-evidence storytelling.

task_blueprints.title: Finalize reproducibility appendix and submission-ready manuscript
task_blueprints.description: Complete appendix/checklists and final manuscript polish for submission.

quality_gate: Slide flow reflects the method contribution and strongest results
Homepage and narration plans are specific enough to produce assets

task_blueprints.title: Draft slide outline, speaking track, and homepage structure
task_blueprints.description: Turn the paper narrative into a promotion-ready deck outline, narration plan, and homepage information architecture.

task_blueprints.title: Generate slide visuals and supporting homepage assets
task_blueprints.description: Prepare presentation visuals and homepage-ready figures from paper assets.

task_blueprints.title: Produce narration audio and assemble delivery outputs
task_blueprints.description: Generate TTS narration and package slide, homepage, and demo-video deliverables.
